form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into seventh behind Perfect Promises at Yonkers Raceway over 1609m in a 3-6YO30CLM on February 9 at $5.06. Then a handy effort when beaten by 7 m finishing second behind Base Stealer at this track over 1609m in a NW5000L4 on March 22 at $4.10. In the mix from the inside draw.

form.formComment: Nine-year-old gelding been racing consistently with 3 consecutive minor placings. Fair effort last start 2nd (Fr4) over 1609m at this track, beaten 5 m by Fox Valley Monaco (1:53.10) in NW5000L4 on March 29 at $13.60. Will need plenty of improvement to feature.

form.formComment: Recent form below what he is capable of. Last start 6th (Fr6) over 1609m at Yonkers Raceway beaten 12 m by Speaker Of Peace (1:54.10) in NW10241L5 on March 16 at $11.79. At the previous start 5th (Fr3) over 1609m at Pocono Downs, beaten 6 m by Mirragon (1:52.40) in NW9500L5 on March 7 at $7.70. Expecting a spike in form this time.
